# Review Checklist

Check for:
- Crossplane v2-native design
- no claims
- namespaced resource assumptions are correct
- clear XRD schema
- sensible defaults and validation
- provider config references are explicit
- function pipeline is wired correctly
- patches are understandable
- namespace boundaries are safe
- troubleshooting path is clear
- one Composition per abstraction
- deliberate secret publishing
- cluster-scoped exceptions explicitly justified
